이사야 43:1.content: But now Yahweh who created you, Jacob, and he who formed you, Israel, says: “Don’t be afraid, for I have redeemed you. I have called you by your name. You are mine.

이사야 43:2.content: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you, and through the rivers, they will not overflow you. When you walk through the fire, you will not be burned, and flame will not scorch you.

이사야 43:3.content: For I am Yahweh your God, the Holy One of Israel, your Savior. I have given Egypt as your ransom, Ethiopia and Seba in your place.

이사야 43:4.content: Since you have been precious and honored in my sight, and I have loved you, therefore I will give people in your place, and nations instead of your life.

이사야 43:5.content: Don’t be afraid, for I am with you. I will bring your offspring from the east, and gather you from the west.

이사야 43:6.content: I will tell the north, ‘Give them up!’ and tell the south, ‘Don’t hold them back! Bring my sons from far away, and my daughters from the ends of the earth—

이사야 43:7.content: everyone who is called by my name, and whom I have created for my glory, whom I have formed, yes, whom I have made.’ ”

이사야 43:8.content: Bring out the blind people who have eyes, and the deaf who have ears.

이사야 43:9.content: Let all the nations be gathered together, and let the peoples be assembled. Who among them can declare this, and show us former things? Let them bring their witnesses, that they may be justified, or let them hear, and say, “That is true.”

이사야 43:10.content: “You are my witnesses,” says Yahweh, “With my servant whom I have chosen; that you may know and believe me, and understand that I am he. Before me there was no God formed, neither will there be after me.

이사야 43:11.content: I myself am Yahweh. Besides me, there is no savior.

이사야 43:12.content: I have declared, I have saved, and I have shown, and there was no strange god among you. Therefore you are my witnesses”, says Yahweh, “and I am God.

이사야 43:13.content: Yes, since the day was, I am he. There is no one who can deliver out of my hand. I will work, and who can hinder it?”

이사야 43:14.content: Yahweh, your Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel says: “For your sake, I have sent to Babylon, and I will bring all of them down as fugitives, even the Chaldeans, in the ships of their rejoicing.

이사야 43:15.content: I am Yahweh, your Holy One, the Creator of Israel, your King.”

이사야 43:16.content: Yahweh, who makes a way in the sea, and a path in the mighty waters,

이사야 43:17.content: who brings out the chariot and horse, the army and the mighty man (they lie down together, they shall not rise; they are extinct, they are quenched like a wick) says:

이사야 43:18.content: “Don’t remember the former things, and don’t consider the things of old.

이사야 43:19.content: Behold, I will do a new thing. It springs out now. Don’t you know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.

이사야 43:20.content: The animals of the field, the jackals and the ostriches, shall honor me, because I give water in the wilderness and rivers in the desert, to give drink to my people, my chosen,

이사야 43:21.content: the people which I formed for myself, that they might declare my praise.

이사야 43:22.content: Yet you have not called on me, Jacob; but you have been weary of me, Israel.

이사야 43:23.content: You have not brought me any of your sheep for burnt offerings, neither have you honored me with your sacrifices. I have not burdened you with offerings, nor wearied you with frankincense.

이사야 43:24.content: You have bought me no sweet cane with money, nor have you filled me with the fat of your sacrifices, but you have burdened me with your sins. You have wearied me with your iniquities.

이사야 43:25.content: I, even I, am he who blots out your transgressions for my own sake; and I will not remember your sins.

이사야 43:26.content: Put me in remembrance. Let us plead together. Declare your case, that you may be justified.

이사야 43:27.content: Your first father sinned, and your teachers have transgressed against me.

이사야 43:28.content: Therefore I will profane the princes of the sanctuary; and I will make Jacob a curse, and Israel an insult.”
